nasb.text: Then he said to me, “These are the boiling places where the ministers of the house shall boil the sacrifices of the people.”

esv.text: Then he said to me, “These are the kitchens where those who minister at the temple shall boil the sacrifices of the people.”

cnv.text: 他對我說：“這些都是廚房，在聖殿裡供職的要在這裡煮人民的祭物。”

ccb.text: 他对我说：“这是圣殿的仆役替百姓煮祭物的地方。”
